pvs.description: 2010.7.29発売のプレイステーション・ポータブル専用ソフト「初音ミク -Project DIVA- 2nd」のエディットモード＆エンディングに収録されました♪DIVA 2ndエディットPV作ってくれた 渡辺くん さんありがとうー♪→sm14417487スペイン語カラオケ！！Hi Saiya, I'm most grateful to you for animation.→http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8qmSAo4hAmU『 Hallo World 』Graphics: hata_hata →http://piapro.jp/hata_hataGraphics: nobuyuki →http://piapro.jp/nobuyuki0212Lyrics: longan →http://piapro.jp/longanMusic: DuronSpitfire →http://piapro.jp/duron777全作品：mylist/69058718
pvs.name: 【Project DIVA 2nd収録曲】【鏡音リン】 Hallo World 【オリジナル】

pvs.author: Jrharbort Productions
pvs.description:
Been busy. Here's some Techno Rock to pass the time. READ FOR MORE ↓↓↓

This is another bonus track from Project Diva 2nd on PSP, much like my previous upload of "EXtend". This is also one of the tracks that caught my attention. Finding this one was just as difficult as finding EXtend. Likely because I found both of them in the SAME PLACE.

So yeah, this track is kinda short. The ending is also "meh-ish", but I love how the Vocals and instrumental was played out in this piece.

This track was produced by duron777.

Artist piapro page: http://piapro.jp/duron777

Music source: http://piapro.jp/content/0d4t3w9yob9jb7ev

IMAGE: http://www.pixiv.net/member_illust.php?mode=medium&illust_id=15104686&tag=%E9%8F%A1%E9%9F%B3%E3%83%AA%E3%83%B3
pvs.name: 【鏡音リン - Kagamine Rin】Hallo World【Original】
